Our Story

Born in Bengaluru,
Loyal to Barça

It all started four years ago, in the crossroads and quiet corners of Bengaluru. Bound by nothing more than a shared love for FC Barcelona, a few strangers decided to gather for a match. Some of us had carried this love since the 90s — through eras, legends, and unforgettable nights.

Our very first screening was for Barça vs Cádiz. Just eight of us showed up.

Eight strangers. One crest. One shared passion.

What began as whispers slowly turned into echoes. The chants grew louder, the circle grew wider, and the energy became something impossible to ignore. Before we knew it, 500+ voices shook Bengaluru on a magical Clásico night — a sea of Blaugrana united thousands of kilometers away from Camp Nou.

In these four years, we've lived every emotion together.

There were the heartbreaks — painful Champions League nights in the post-Messi era, the agony of Araújo's red card, and those two haunting minutes against Inter that still echo in our minds.

But there were nights of pure joy too.

The domestic treble, the breathtaking rise of Lamine Yamal, unforgettable thrashings of Madrid and Bayern, and that moment — Koundé's strike in the Copa del Rey final — when the entire room erupted in disbelief and celebration.

From being unseen to featuring on La Liga's official Instagram and appearing in Catalan magazines, our journey has been more than just football screenings.

Because somewhere along the way, something beautiful happened.

We stopped being strangers. We became a family.

A family bound not just by matches on a screen, but by shared chants, friendships, celebrations, and heartbreaks.

From Catalonia to Bengaluru, one anthem connects us all.

One heart. One soul. One crest. One stand.

Visca El Barça.

FCB Bengaluru Presents

Upcoming Events

Screenings, meetups, and exclusive fan experiences — all happening in Bengaluru. Be there, bleed blaugrana.

🎬 Live Screening
El Clásico Watch Party
Saturday, 26 October 2025 · 9:00 PM IST
The Pint Room, Indiranagar, Bengaluru
Capacity: 200 seats · 68 remaining

The biggest match in world football. Join 200 Culers at The Pint Room for a full match-day experience — reserved seating, Barça merch giveaways, and DJ set post-game.

₹499 per person
⭐ Special Event
Champions League Night
Wednesday, 6 November 2025 · 1:30 AM IST
Toit Brewpub, Sadashivanagar, Bengaluru
Capacity: 150 · Members get priority

UCL knockout stage. Full venue takeover with giant screens, food & drinks packages, and a special halftime trivia with prizes worth ₹10,000.

₹799 per person
🤝 Member Meetup
Culers Bengaluru Meetup
Sunday, 10 November 2025 · 4:00 PM IST
Cubbon Park Amphitheatre, Bengaluru
Open to all · Members Free

Our quarterly community meetup. New season introductions, merchandise preview, plans for upcoming match screenings, and plenty of Barça banter over food.

FREE for members
🎬 Live Screening
Derby Day: La Liga Weekend
Saturday, 23 November 2025 · 10:15 PM IST
Hard Rock Café, MG Road, Bengaluru
Capacity: 120 seats

Barça take on Atletico Madrid. Join the Culers at Hard Rock for live screening, FC Barcelona jersey night, and dinner combos with drinks.

₹599 per person
⭐ Annual Event
FCB Bengaluru Annual Gala
Saturday, 14 December 2025 · 7:00 PM IST
The Lalit Ashok Hotel, Bengaluru
300 seats · Black tie optional

Our flagship annual celebration. Awards night, season highlights reel, exclusive merchandise auction, live performances, gourmet dinner, and the FCB Bengaluru Member of the Year award.

₹2,999 per couple
🤝 5-a-side
Culers Football Tournament
Sunday, 5 January 2026 · 7:00 AM IST
Delhi Public School Grounds, Whitefield
16 teams max · Register as team of 5

Play like your heroes. Register your 5-a-side team for the FCB Bengaluru inter-fan tournament. Winners receive exclusive FCB Bengaluru trophies and merchandise bundles.

₹1,500 per team
